config.name: citrix_netscaler_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: citrix_netscaler_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Network Activity (1001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T11:04:02.264437

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local timestamp_pattern = "^(%d%d%d%d%-%d%d%-%d%d)T(%d%d:%d%d:%d%d)"
local ip_pattern = "^%d+%.%d+%.%d+%.%d+$"

-- Cached reference to frequently used functions
local type = type
local tonumber = tonumber
local os_time = os.time
local string_match = string.match
local string_format = string.format

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output structure with local references
    local output = {
        class_uid = 1001,
        class_name = "Network Activity", 
        category_uid = 1,
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 100101,
        metadata = {
            version = "1.0.0",
            product = {
                name = "NetScaler",
                vendor = "Citrix"
            }
        },
        actor = {},
        src = {},
        session = {},
        network_activity = {}
    }

    -- Optimized field transformations using local variables
    local user = record.User
    if user and type(user) == "string" then
        output.actor.user = {name = user}
    end

    local client_ip = record.Client_ip
    if client_ip and string_match(client_ip, ip_pattern) then
        output.src.ip = {address = client_ip}
    end

    local session_id = record.SessionId
    if session_id then
        output.session.uid = tostring(session_id)
    end

    -- Timestamp handling with validation
    local timestamp = record.timestamp
    if timestamp then
        local ts_valid = false
        local year, time = string_match(timestamp, timestamp_pattern)
        if year and time then
            output.network_activity.start_time_dt = string_format("%sT%sZ", year, time)
            ts_valid = true
        end
        
        if not ts_valid then
            output.network_activity.start_time_dt = os_time() * 1000
        end
    end

    -- Additional network activity fields
    if record.Total_bytes_recv then
        output.network_activity.bytes_in = tonumber(record.Total_bytes_recv)
    end
    
    if record.Total_bytes_send then
        output.network_activity.bytes_out = tonumber(record.Total_bytes_send)
    end

    -- Validation of required OCSF fields
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Missing required class_uid"
    end

    -- Add default timestamp if not present
    if not output.time then
        output.time = os_time() * 1000
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handling wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string_format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end
